module_info.docstring:
Database Failure Handling Tests.

Tests for graceful handling of database issues:
- Database file missing (should auto-create)
- Schema migration on startup
- Concurrent write handling (retry_on_db_lock)
- Transaction rollback on error
- Session cleanup on exception

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-aea

classes.name: TestDatabaseAutoCreation
classes.docstring: Tests for automatic database and table creation.

methods.name: test_ensure_schema_creates_database_file
methods.docstring: ensure_schema creates database file when it doesn't exist.

methods.name: test_ensure_schema_creates_tables
methods.docstring: ensure_schema creates all required tables.

methods.name: test_ensure_schema_creates_fts_table
methods.docstring: ensure_schema creates FTS virtual table for message search.

methods.name: test_ensure_schema_creates_indexes
methods.docstring: ensure_schema creates performance indexes.

methods.name: test_ensure_schema_is_idempotent
methods.docstring: ensure_schema can be called multiple times safely.

methods.name: test_retry_on_db_lock_succeeds_without_error
methods.docstring: Decorator passes through successful function calls.

methods.name: test_retry_on_db_lock_retries_on_lock_error
methods.docstring: Decorator retries on database lock errors.

methods.name: test_retry_on_db_lock_exhausts_retries
methods.docstring: Decorator raises after exhausting retries.

methods.name: test_retry_on_db_lock_ignores_non_lock_errors
methods.docstring: Decorator does not retry on non-lock operational errors.

methods.name: test_retry_on_db_lock_detects_busy_error
methods.docstring: Decorator retries on 'database is busy' errors.

classes.name: TestQueryTrackingHelpers
classes.docstring: Tests for query tracking utilities and normalization helpers.

classes.name: TestTransactionRollback
classes.docstring: Tests for transaction rollback on errors.

methods.name: test_session_rollback_on_exception
methods.docstring: Session rolls back uncommitted changes when exception occurs.

methods.name: test_explicit_rollback_discards_changes
methods.docstring: Explicit session.rollback() discards uncommitted changes.

classes.name: TestSessionCleanup
classes.docstring: Tests for proper session cleanup on exceptions.

methods.name: test_session_closed_after_context
methods.docstring: Session is properly closed after context manager exits.

methods.name: test_session_closed_on_exception
methods.docstring: Session is properly closed even when exception occurs.

methods.name: test_multiple_concurrent_sessions
methods.docstring: Multiple concurrent sessions work independently.

classes.name: TestEngineAndFactory
classes.docstring: Tests for engine and session factory initialization.

methods.name: test_reset_database_state_clears_globals
methods.docstring: reset_database_state clears all global state.

methods.name: test_get_session_factory_creates_factory
methods.docstring: get_session_factory creates and returns session factory.

methods.name: test_wal_mode_enabled
methods.docstring: WAL mode is enabled for SQLite databases.

methods.name: test_busy_timeout_set
methods.docstring: SQLite busy_timeout is set for lock handling.

methods.name: test_synchronous_mode_normal
methods.docstring: SQLite synchronous mode is set to NORMAL for performance.
